name: omnifocus-custom
title: OmniFocus Custom
description: Quick add tasks anywhere in OmniFocus — projects, tasks, or subtasks
author: loudog

commands.name: quick-add-anywhere
commands.title: Quick Add Anywhere
commands.subtitle: OmniFocus
commands.description: Search for a project or task, then add a new task or subtask there

commands.name: show-today
commands.title: Show Today
commands.subtitle: OmniFocus
commands.description: Today's command center — overdue, due today, flagged, and due soon tasks with full actions

commands.name: quick-add-inbox
commands.title: Quick Add to Inbox
commands.subtitle: OmniFocus
commands.description: Instantly add a task to your OmniFocus inbox — zero UI, just type and go

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
